mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course(name, category_id, lecturer_id, description, cover_url, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{lecturerId}, #{description}, #{coverUrl}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE course
name = #{name}, category_id = #{categoryId}, lecturer_id = #{lecturerId}, description = #{description}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM course WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.category_id, cc.name AS category_name, c.lecturer_id, l.name AS lecturer_name, c.description, c.cover_url, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time FROM course c LEFT JOIN course_category cc ON c.category_id = cc.id AND cc.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN lecturer l ON c.lecturer_id = l.id AND l.deleted = 0 WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM course WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = 0
